vibe: Professional cinematographic planning tool. Culturally grounded, emotionally accurate, and dense for power users.

rules.headings: Use Cormorant Garamond for poetic/script inputs and project titles to evoke cultural depth. Use Manrope for UI panel headers and technical labels.
rules.tracking: Use tracking-tight for large headings. Use tracking-widest uppercase for panel overlines (e.g., text-[10px] tracking-widest text-secondary).

layout_and_spacing.architecture: Multi-panel UI. Use a horizontal scrolling flex layout or react-resizable-panels to fit the 5 core modules: Understanding, Context, Scene Outline, Shot List, Generation.

borders_and_radii.radius: rounded-lg for panels, rounded-md for inner cards. NO aggressive rounding.
borders_and_radii.borders: 1px solid border-default. Rely on borders instead of shadows in dark mode.

components.panels: Use dark flat surfaces (bg-[#141417]) with a 1px border. DO NOT use heavy drop shadows.
components.scene_and_shot_cards: Kanban style or stacked cards. Use subtle hover states (bg-surface_hover translate-y-[-2px] transition-all).
components.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized. Dark backgrounds, high-contrast text.
components.buttons: Primary CTAs should use bg-[#D4AF37] text-inverse. Secondary buttons use transparent backgrounds with border-default.
components.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, cards) MUST have descriptive data-testid attributes in kebab-case.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Example: hover:bg-[#27272E] hover:text-white.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use short, crisp transitions. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use a subtle glowing trace or opacity pulse. No chaotic spinners.

media.guidelines: Images must have dark overlays (bg-black/40) if text is placed over them. Use these images for project covers or scene visualization placeholders.

image_urls.description: Urdu manuscript for cultural context input covers
Traditional South Asian gate for location context
Cinematic aerial night shot for wide scene cards
Dark film studio/garage for interior shot cards

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind using the precise hex codes provided in the 'colors' object. Map them to CSS variables.
2. Use 'Manrope' for the main application sans-serif font, and 'Cormorant Garamond' for the poetic input viewer and major project titles. DO NOT use Inter.

3. Build a multi-panel layout using flex/grid. Consider using 'react-resizable-panels' for the 5 core engines (Understanding, Context, Scene, Shot, Generation) so power users can adjust screen real estate.
4. DO NOT use teal or purple-blue gradients. Stick to the Cinematic Gold/Terracotta and Deep Slate palette.
5. Use Shadcn components for all inputs, dropdowns, and buttons. Customize the borders to be 1px solid #27272A.
6. Scene and Shot cards must look like professional film slates or storyboards, not generic SaaS cards. Include overlines with tight tracking.
7. MANDATORY: Every interactive element must include a 'data-testid' attribute.
8. Use the provided Unsplash URLs for project thumbnails and scene visualization placeholders.
